reference: Hi, I found out I had blood clots over the recent months. I still have blood clots right now, but I am on blood thinners, and I am at a therapeutic level. Before this all happened to me, I was a frequent user of cannabis, but the doctors said I need to stop because they said smoking cannabis can kill me. Is this true or not? Because I really want to smoke again.
text: Hi, I found out I had blood clots over the recent months. I have blood clots right now, but I am on blood thinners and I am at a therapeutic level. Before this all happened to me, I was a frequent user of cannabis, but the doctors said I need to stop because they said smoking cannabis can kill me. Is this true or not? Cause I really want to smoke it.
